'''ralogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jikungu|jikungu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jikungu|jikungu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ralogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rælegeth|rælegeth]] || [[word:rælegej|rælegej]] || [[word:rælegesh|rælegesh]] || [[word:rælege|rælege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralologoth|ralologoth]] || [[word:ralologoj|ralologoj]] || [[word:ralologosh|ralologosh]] || [[word:ralologo|ralologo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralogoth|ralogoth]] || [[word:ralogoj|ralogoj]] || [[word:ralogosh|ralogosh]] || [[word:ralogo|ralogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralofgoth|ralofgoth]] || [[word:ralofgoj|ralofgoj]] || [[word:ralofgosh|ralofgosh]] || [[word:ralofgof|ralofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ralogotho|ralogotho]] || [[word:ralogojo|ralogojo]] || [[word:ralogosho|ralogosho]] || [[word:ralogoko|ralogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ralogoth|ralogoth]] || [[word:ralogoj|ralogoj]] || [[word:ralogosh|ralogosh]] || [[word:ralogo|ralogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ralogothol|ralogothol]] || [[word:ralogojol|ralogojol]] || [[word:ralogoshol|ralogoshol]] || [[word:ralogokol|ralogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ralogothotho|ralogothotho]] || [[word:ralogojojo|ralogojojo]] || [[word:ralogoshosho|ralogoshosho]] || [[word:ralogoko|ralogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ralogothon|ralogothon]] || [[word:ralogojon|ralogojon]] || [[word:ralogoshon|ralogoshon]] || [[word:ralogokon|ralogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ralogothoro|ralogothoro]] || [[word:ralogojoro|ralogojoro]] || [[word:ralogoshoro|ralogoshoro]] || [[word:ralogokoro|ralogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
